_meta.description: Curated VoiceDesign preset library for Qwen3-TTS. Each preset resolves to a natural-language 'instruct' string (voice traits + emotion/style). VoiceDesign generates the voice from this text, so African/child/teen voices are achievable here but NOT in the fixed CustomVoice model.
_meta.usage: POST /tts with {"mode":"voice_design","voice":"<id>","text":"..."}. Optionally add "instruct" to append extra emotion/style (merged after the preset).

presets.name: Nigerian Male (Lagos, warm)
presets.instruct: Nigerian male, deep warm voice with a clear Lagos accent, speak cheerfully and welcoming like a friendly uncle

presets.name: Nigerian Male (Hausa, calm)
presets.instruct: Nigerian male from the north, calm steady deep voice with a gentle Hausa-influenced English accent, speak reassuringly and measured

presets.name: Nigerian Female (Lagos, bright)
presets.instruct: Nigerian female, bright friendly voice with a Lagos accent, speak lively and warm like a cheerful presenter

presets.name: Nigerian Female (Igbo, gentle)
presets.instruct: Nigerian female with a soft Igbo-influenced English accent, gentle soothing voice, speak politely and kindly

presets.name: Nigerian Male (Yoruba, deep)
presets.instruct: Nigerian male with a deep resonant voice and a Yoruba-influenced English accent, speak confidently and with quiet authority

presets.name: Nigerian Male (Abuja, neutral)
presets.instruct: Nigerian male with a neutral educated Abuja accent, clear professional voice, speak plainly and articulately

presets.name: Nigerian Teen Boy (Lagos)
presets.instruct: Nigerian teenage boy with a youthful Lagos accent, energetic playful voice, speak casually and with excitement

presets.name: Nigerian Child Girl (Lagos)
presets.instruct: Nigerian little girl with a high-pitched sweet voice and a Lagos accent, speak curiously and with childlike wonder

presets.name: Ghanaian Male (Accra)
presets.instruct: Ghanaian male with a warm rhythmic Accra accent, easygoing voice, speak with a natural melodic flow

presets.name: Ghanaian Female (Accra)
presets.instruct: Ghanaian female with a bright expressive Accra accent, warm voice, speak with lively intonation

presets.name: Kenyan Male (Nairobi)
presets.instruct: Kenyan male with a clear Nairobi accent, confident upbeat voice, speak with a smooth East African cadence

presets.name: Kenyan Female (Nairobi)
presets.instruct: Kenyan female with a friendly melodic Nairobi accent, warm voice, speak with gentle musical intonation

presets.name: South African Male (Joburg)
presets.instruct: South African male with a relaxed Johannesburg English accent, deep friendly voice, speak with a laid-back confident tone

presets.name: Ethiopian Female (Addis)
presets.instruct: Ethiopian female with a gentle graceful voice and a soft Ethiopian-influenced English accent, speak calmly and elegantly

presets.name: US Male (General American)
presets.instruct: American male with a clear general-American accent, friendly neutral voice, speak naturally and confidently

presets.name: US Female (General American)
presets.instruct: American female with a warm clear general-American accent, upbeat voice, speak brightly and articulately

presets.name: UK Male (Received Pronunciation)
presets.instruct: British male with a polished Received Pronunciation accent, calm articulate voice, speak with refined clarity

presets.name: UK Female (Received Pronunciation)
presets.instruct: British female with a crisp Received Pronunciation accent, friendly elegant voice, speak with bright clarity

presets.name: French Female (Parisian)
presets.instruct: French female with a charming Parisian accent, expressive warm voice, speak with natural French intonation

presets.name: German Male (Berlin)
presets.instruct: German male with a steady Berlin accent, warm direct voice, speak clearly and with quiet confidence

presets.name: Child Boy (Generic)
presets.instruct: Little boy with a high-pitched playful voice, speak curiously and with childlike excitement

presets.name: Child Girl (Generic)
presets.instruct: Little girl with a sweet high-pitched voice, speak eagerly and with cheerful wonder

presets.name: Teen Male (Generic)
presets.instruct: Teenage boy with an energetic casual voice, speak expressively and with youthful enthusiasm

presets.name: Teen Female (Generic)
presets.instruct: Teenage girl with a lively friendly voice, speak brightly and with teenage energy
